task_description: Iteration 1 review-fix-optimize cycle: fix bugs in data processing (negative debt ratio, RSI edge case), add missing ticker validation to standalone API, improve error handling and user feedback across CLI/dashboard/cron, add backtest log rotation, and write regression tests

verification.summary: All 86 tests pass (78 original + 8 new regression tests). Build via pip install -e '.[dev,data]' succeeds. CLI and API verified manually. Semantic review issues addressed in follow-up commit.
